entities.name: INTERCROPPING
entities.description: Growing sorghum and groundnut together in a specific row arrangement

entities.name: SOLE CROPS
entities.description: Growing sorghum or groundnut as single species crops

entities.name: LIMITED WATER SUPPLY
entities.description: Restriction of water availability for the crops

entities.name: ALFISOL
entities.description: The specific soil type used in the study

entities.name: CENTRAL INDIA
entities.description: The geographic region where the study was conducted

entities.name: PLANT GROWTH
entities.description: The rate of increase in plant size and biomass

entities.name: DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The process of plant maturation, including pod formation

entities.name: LIGHT INTERCEPTION
entities.description: The fraction of incident light captured by the plant canopy

entities.name: DRY MATTER PRODUCTION
entities.description: The accumulation of biomass in the plants

entities.name: POD NUMBERS
entities.description: The quantity of pods produced by groundnut plants

entities.name: HARVEST INDEX
entities.description: The ratio of harvested product to total biomass

entities.name: SHADING
entities.description: The reduction of light reaching a plant due to the presence of another plant

entities.name: TEMPERATURE
entities.description: The thermal environment affecting plant growth and development

entities.name: WATER POTENTIAL GRADIENTS
entities.description: Differences in soil water tension affecting plant water uptake

entities.name: MICROCLIMATE
entities.description: The local atmospheric conditions within the crop canopy

entities.name: RESOURCE USE
entities.description: The utilization of light and water by the plants
